subject: [RFC PATCH 24/45] mm: page_alloc: targeted evacuation and dynamic reserves for tainted SPBs

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch reduces the proliferation of tainted superpageblocks by introducing two changes to the page allocation algorithm. Firstly, it dynamically scales the movable steering reserve based on the size of the superpageblock, ensuring that there is always a sufficient amount of free space for unmovable and reclaimable claims. Secondly, it implements a two-phase targeted evacuation process before dropping ALLOC_NOFRAGMENT allocations, which evacuates movable pages from tainted superpageblocks to create free pageblocks and avoid tainting clean superpageblocks unnecessarily.
